axioms.statement: Encoding objects first land on family-patched base manifolds rather than one global uniform coordinate system.
Each concept is a section with a local offset on a family patch rather than an isolated point.
Attribute, relation, and stress are attached fibers over concept sections rather than external labels.
axioms.formal: H(I) = (B_family, E_concept, F_attr, F_rel, F_stress, P_path, O_overlap)

axioms.statement: Update legality is decided by intersected cone families rather than a single scalar threshold.
axioms.formal: A = K_ret INTERSECT K_id INTERSECT K_read INTERSECT K_phase INTERSECT K_bridge

axioms.statement: Long-run system viability is determined by stratified manifolds with restricted overlaps.
axioms.formal: M_feas = UNION_m U_m with transition maps phi_(m->n) defined only on overlaps U_m INTERSECT U_n

axioms.statement: Usable readout, bridge lift, and phase switching all proceed along admissible paths.
axioms.formal: Enc_path(c, mode_1 -> mode_2) = (E_c, Omega^(f_c)_upd, Omega^(f_c)_read, Tau_readout(c, mode_1 -> mode_2), chi_A, chi_M)

axioms.statement: System-level neural properties are projections of the same encoding structure rather than separate add-on modules.
axioms.formal: Properties_brain = Phi(H(I), A(I), M_feas(I), F, Q, R)

compressed_view.core_claim: ICSPB can now be treated as an axiom system rather than only a narrative theory candidate.
compressed_view.bundle_reference: H(I) = (B_family, E_concept, F_attr, F_rel, F_stress, P_path, O_overlap)
compressed_view.admissibility_reference: A = K_ret INTERSECT K_id INTERSECT K_read INTERSECT K_phase INTERSECT K_bridge
compressed_view.viability_reference: M_feas = UNION_m U_m with transition maps phi_(m->n) defined only on overlaps U_m INTERSECT U_n

verdict.core_answer: The new mathematical theory candidate now has a first explicit axiom layer.
verdict.next_theory_target: derive operator families and falsifiable predictions from the ICSPB axioms.
